# Slugs in inputs/<slug>.tex whose Rust MathML output does not yet
# match upstream KaTeX. The snapshot test still loads the expected
# files (they're regenerated by `cargo xtask snapshot bless` from
# upstream), but assertions are skipped for these slugs. As parity
# bugs land their fixes, prune the matching line here so the test
# starts enforcing equality.
#
# `cargo xtask snapshot verify` ignores this file — it always checks
# that committed expected files still match upstream verbatim.
#
# Format: one slug per line. Blank lines and lines starting with `#`
# are ignored.

02_two_digit
03_decimal
abs
acute
bar
big_omega
binom
boxed
braces
brackets
breve
cfrac
check_acc
color_blue
color_hex
color_red
cos
ddot
det
dfrac
dot_acc
emptyset
exists
exp
forall
grave
hat
iff
infty
int_indexed
int_simple
left_right
left_right_braces
left_right_brackets
left_right_pipe
lim
ln
log
mathbb
mathbf
mathcal
mathfrak
mathit
mathrm
mathsf
mathtt
max_op
min_op
nabla
not_equal
notin
oint
overbrace
overline
parens
partial
prod_indexed
sin
sum_indexed
tan
text_in_math
tfrac
theta_capital
tilde
underbrace
underline
vec
